name: Reinforcement Learning Motor Babbling Dataset Generation
description: Create an automated data collection pipeline in CoppeliaSim for Machine Learning using the scene 'messaging/movementViaRemoteApi.ttt'. Add a Vision Sensor to observe the robot and use the ZMQ Remote API to perform motor babbling for at least 50 simulation steps by commanding random joint positions and recording the state. Save camera images to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/images/ and export a tabular dataset to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/rl_dataset.csv with columns: step_id, j0, j1, j2, j3, j4, j5, ee_x, ee_y, ee_z, and image_filename. Finally, save a metadata file to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/dataset_metadata.json containing the fields: total_samples (int), camera_resolution (list of 2 ints), and robot_moved (boolean).
